title: RLMixins
description: Minecraft and Minecraft mod tweaker and fixer for the modpack RLCraft
body:
RLMixins is a mixin tweaker mod with patches and tweaks for the modpack RLCraft.  
  
Sister mod of FermiumMixins ([https://modrinth.com/mod/fermiummixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/fermiummixins)) which is a more general purpose tweaker mod meant for general modpack use.  
Both mods can be used at the same time and are fully compatible.  
  
RLMixins currently contains over 30 different patches designed for the modpack RLCraft.  
While designed for RLCraft, all patches are still designed to be compatible in other modpacks if desired.  
Every single tweak is toggle-able in RLMixins' config and includes simple mod compatibility warnings.  
By default all config options are disabled for full compatibility with other mods.  

    
**Current Patched Mods:**  

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
- Current Patched Mods:
  
- BetterFoliage/RLFoliage
- BetterQuesting/BetterQuestingStandard  
- BetterSurvival  
- Charm  
- ChunkAnimator  
- DefiledLands  
- EpicSiegeMod  
- IceAndFireRLCraft  
- Inspirations  
- JEI  
- Lycanites  
- MoBends  
- PotionCore  
- Quark  
- RLArtifacts  
- RLCombat  
- Rustic  
- ScalingHealth  
- SRParasites  
</details>
  
**Report any issues to the Github.**  
**Depends on FermiumBooter.**
